parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor in physical environments like a porch, cafe, and car. Lighting, movements, and facial expressions are natural and consistent with standard video recording.

characters.appearance: Adult Black male, bald with a full, thick black beard. He has a medium build and a clear complexion.
characters.wardrobe: Primarily wears a black short-sleeve t-shirt and black athletic shorts. In one scene, he wears a white long-sleeve shirt under a black puffer vest. Wears large black over-ear headphones in some scenes.
characters.demeanor: Energetic, persuasive, and expressive, using frequent hand gestures.

scenes.setting: Front porch of a brick house with a white door, daytime, natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A bald Black man with a full beard stands outdoors in front of a brick house with a white front door. He is holding a small whiteboard and a marker. He gestures animatedly with his hands and the marker while looking directly at the camera. The lighting is natural daylight, casting soft shadows.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter stands on a porch holding a whiteboard with hand-drawn text and logos. He points to the board with a marker while speaking directly to the camera.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Duolingo should be a Duoli-no!
Character A says: First of all, with Duolingo, you have a lack of real-world application.
Character A says: Now for Speak on the other hand, I personally use their free talk feature
scenes.on_screen_text:
duolingo
duoli-no!
duolingo: LACK OF REAL WORLD APPLICATION
Speak: FREE TALK! PRACTICE CONVOS! NOT FLASHCARDS

scenes.setting: Inside a brightly lit cafe, daytime, laptop, coffee cup.

panels.panel_visual_description: The man is seated at a table in a brightly lit cafe with large windows in the background. He is wearing a white long-sleeve shirt, a black puffer vest, and large black over-ear headphones. He is looking at a laptop screen that is partially visible and gesturing with his right hand as if speaking to someone. A white coffee cup sits on the table in the foreground.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter is shown in a cafe setting, wearing headphones and interacting with a laptop. He appears to be practicing speaking.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: and I practice conversations, not just memorize flashcards.

scenes.setting: Front porch of a brick house with a white door, daytime, natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: The man is back on the front porch, holding the whiteboard. He points to the whiteboard with a marker, emphasizing his points with expressive facial movements. He maintains eye contact with the camera.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter is back on the porch, holding the whiteboard with new text. He points to the board to emphasize his second argument.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Here's the second point.
Character A says: A lot of people who use Duolingo talk about how repetitive and shallow the content is.
scenes.on_screen_text:
duolingo: REPETITIVE & SHALLOW CONTENT!
Speak: RESPONSE CORRECTION!

panels.panel_visual_description: A digital interface with a solid white background. The layout is clean and modern, featuring a few simple geometric shapes and a play/pause control area at the bottom.

scenes.visual_description: A screencast of a language learning app is shown. It displays a Spanish sentence with its English translation and playback controls.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: But Speak on the other hand, uses responsive correction.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Speak now...
He estado pensando en mudarme para estar más cerca de mi trabajo.
I've been thinking about moving to be closer to my job.

scenes.setting: Front porch of a brick house with a white door, daytime, natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: The man is on the front porch again, holding the whiteboard. He gestures with his free hand and the marker, looking directly at the camera with an earnest and slightly frustrated expression.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter is on the porch with the whiteboard showing his final point. He gestures emphatically while speaking.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: And lastly, you gotta stop it with the streaks.
Character A says: And it doesn't lead to any real fluency.
Character A says: As opposed to Speak,
scenes.on_screen_text:
duolingo: PRIORITIZES GAMIFICATION
Speak: CONFIDENCE TRACKING, NOT STREAKS

panels.panel_visual_description: The man is sitting in the driver's seat of a car. He is wearing a black t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is smiling broadly and gesturing with a clenched fist, looking towards the camera. The car's interior roof, sun visor, and a glimpse of the outside through the window are visible.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter is sitting in his car wearing headphones. He smiles and pumps his fist while a call-to-action overlay appears at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: it tracks your confidence, not streaks.
